name: MySpeed
description: Speed test analysis software that shows your internet speed for up to 30 days
compose:
name: slashnode-myspeed
services:
  web:
    image: germannewsmaker/myspeed:1.0.9
    container_name: myspeed
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data-myspeed:/myspeed/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5216:5216
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-myspeed:
    name: slashnode-myspeed_web_data-myspeed
